testsuite.name: fireflink.tests.configuration.GroupsTest

testcase.name: GR004
testcase.system-out: Successfully signed in to fireflink Name required error is displayed

testcase.system-out: Successfully signed in to fireflink Group is created successfully

testcase.name: GR005
testcase.system-out: Successfully signed in to fireflink Entered Recipient Name Entered Recipient Email Recipient is added successfully
